verdict_reasoning: TGOLN2 is a multi-pass TM protein with canonical localization to the trans-Golgi network and recycling endosomes. While it is a TM protein, its TM domains are embedded in endomembrane compartments, not the plasma membrane. No documented cell-state induction, tissue-restricted surface display, lysosomal exocytosis, dual PM-localization, or stable TM-partner tethering. The protein remains confined to the secretory pathway and does not reach the outer leaflet of the plasma membrane under baseline or documented non-baseline conditions.
